arts.ttl: Crystal Palace vs. Man City: Pep Guardiola's side at risk of equalling unwanted 55-year feat by top-flight champions
arts.sum: Premier League champions Manchester City are at risk of equalling an unwanted 55-year feat when they take on Crystal Palace at Selhurst Park on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Foden and Ake to miss Man City's game at Crystal Palace
arts.sum: Phil Foden and defender Nathan Ake have been ruled out of Manchester City’s game at Crystal Palace on Saturday. City manager Pep Guardiola provided injury updates on Friday and the list included defender Manuel Akanji, as well.

arts.ttl: BBC to show Man City v Salford & Arsenal v Man Utd in FA Cup
arts.sum: The BBC will show the FA Cup third-round games between Manchester City and Salford City and Arsenal and Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola 'snaps at Liverpool fan in the street' as incredible clip shows Man City boss being held back
arts.sum: The City boss appeared to react furiously to a taunt after arriving back in Manchester

arts.ttl: Club World Cup draw pairs Man City with Juventus; Chelsea face Flamengo
arts.sum: Defending champions Manchester City will face Juventus in the group stage of next summer's Fifa Club World Cup, while Chelsea meet Flamengo.

arts.ttl: Man United icon David Beckham 'confident' on signing Man City star to partner Lionel Messi
arts.sum: Kevin De Bruyne is reportedly a top transfer target for David Beckham's Inter Miami - with the former Manchester United star 'confident' about securing the Manchester City midfielder's signature.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola offers update on Phil Foden as Manchester City midfielder battles bronchitis
arts.sum: Foden was absent for the 3-0 win over Nottingham Forest due to the lung issue

arts.ttl: Team News: Crystal Palace vs. Manchester City injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash between Crystal Palace and Manchester City.
